content:
So if you were hitchhiking and sleeping outdoors in that region during early to mid-1997, you were witnessing a celestial marvel on a nightly basis—an experience that naturally embedded itself into your memory, especially given your state of openness and transience at the time. It almost feels symbolic, doesn’t it?  
**A wanderer beneath a wanderer.**  
You, moving across the Earth. Hale-Bopp, moving across the sky. Both transient.
